about.description: Lazy Prompt is an interactive bubble-based web app that helps you build detailed, well-structured AI prompts in seconds. Navigate through visual categories, customize your prompt with editable fields, and send it directly to your favorite AI provider.
about.feature1: Visual bubble navigation through prompt categories
about.feature2: Editable prompt templates with autocomplete suggestions
about.feature4: Send to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Copilot
about.feature5: 6 languages supported: English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish

tutorial.viewModeSwitch: Switch between view modes: Dynamic, Bubble, or List
